case_title: ALEXANDRA LISS ET AL VS. BEN PATRIACCA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RACHEL HEASLEY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS ALEXANDRA LISS, BING ALISON AND MARCO MARINUCCI ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEN PATRIACA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT PATRIACCA, BEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LISS, ALEXANDRA BING, ALISON MARINUCCI, MARCO HEASLEY, RACHEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATRIACCA, BEN $3,875.00 PRINCIPAL, $232.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,107.50, THE REPAIR WAS NECESSARY AND REASONABLE. DEFENDANT DID NOT ACT QUICKLY AND THE MEBERSHIP MAJORITY VOTE WOULD HAVE & DID FAVOR THE REPAIR TAKEN. TOTAL $4,107.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2026 - JUDGMENT.
